response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and shows no evidence of distributed systems work critical for routing tiling — his C++ exposure is limited to academic/thesis work, and his primary languages are JavaScript/TypeScript/Dlang.
strengths: Proven geospatial project experience with GISCollective, including real-world deployment for environmental mapping.
Strong track record of building scalable systems across diverse stacks and domains, including low-latency services.
Active open-source contributor with tools for testing, web servers, and Dlang ecosystems, demonstrating initiative and craftsmanship.
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial data transformation pipelines.
Lacks demonstrated expertise in distributed systems concepts like fault tolerance, consistency, or service discovery in production.
Primary technical stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/Dlang; minimal evidence of modern C++ systems programming for high-reliability routing.
